LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENTS, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PARTIES TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDERS. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077 RULING: AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY REGENTS TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE ORDER. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Margaret L. Wu, Esq., Senior Counsel, Regents of the Univ. of CA, Tel. 510.987.9747, for defendant and moving party;
Lore Kieve, Esq. of Kieve Law Offices, Tel. 415.364.0060, for plaintiff.

The matter was argued. After arguments, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT was taken under submission. Parties to submit proposed orders. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

RULING: After hearing, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Prevailing party Regents to give notice of the order. (See signed order for details of the ruling.)
